tasks.subject: Task 1: Rewrite e2e_redump_test.go as table-driven multi-fixture suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace TestE2EDeusEx + TestEDCAndECCAgainstDeusEx with table-driven TestE2ERoundTripRealDiscs and TestE2EEDCAndECCRealDiscs covering DX (baseline) and Freelancer (SafeDisc 2.70.030, 588 errors). Each fixture skips independently when its data files are absent. HL1 not included (needs multi-FILE .cue support first).

**Files:**
- Modify (full rewrite): `e2e_redump_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `go test -tags redump_data -run TestE2ERoundTripRealDiscs -v ./...` passes against Freelancer dataset.
- [ ] freelancer sub-test asserts ErrorSectorCount==588, DeltaSize<5MB, container<5MB, byte-equal.
- [ ] deus-ex sub-test calls t.Skipf (data absent).
- [ ] realDiscFixtures has exactly 2 entries (DX, FL); HL1 not present.
- [ ] `go test ./...` (no tag) passes.
- [ ] `go vet -tags redump_data ./...` clean.
- [ ] TestE2EEDCAndECCRealDiscs/freelancer passes (LBAs 0/100/1k/100k unprotected).

**Verify:** `go test -tags redump_data -run TestE2E -v ./... && go vet -tags redump_data ./... && go test ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["e2e_redump_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -tags redump_data -run TestE2E -v ./... && go vet -tags redump_data ./... && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Freelancer round-trip passes byte-equal", "Freelancer error_sector_count == 588", "DX sub-test skips cleanly", "go test ./... no-tag passes", "go vet clean", "realDiscFixtures has 2 entries (DX, FL); HL1 absent"]}
```

tasks_added_post_plan.subject: Task 2: Switch FL signature assertion to data-track-error count (option F)
tasks_added_post_plan.description: Folded into the cycle after first-run revealed a metric definition mismatch: manifest.ErrorSectorCount counts overrides (data errors + lead-in noise + boundaries) while redump.org's 'errors count' counts only data-track ECC/EDC errors. Solution: test-side countDataTrackErrors helper asserts the SafeDisc-class signature (588 for FL); soft sentinel on m.ErrorSectorCount; FL bounds loosened to 15 MiB. Commit 735da03. Also folded: pack.go fix for false-positive sync detection in lead-in noise (commit 57e05b3, after reverting unauthorized commit 05eee78 with revert e0787e9).
